prompt: Create an epic dark fantasy cartographic panorama in a cinematic realistic digital painting style. The scene is a vast medieval coastal world viewed from a very high aerial three-quarter angle, like a game map or fantasy strategy map. In the foreground center is a huge fortified harbor city packed with stone buildings, cathedral towers, walls, docks, small ships, and bridges, surrounded by blue-black ocean and river deltas. A thin bright red route line with small arrowheads is drawn over the landscape, starting at the harbor city, curving across the sea to the right toward a volcanic island, then continuing back through the city and winding northward through forests, rivers, ruined keeps, mountain passes, and finally climbing a monumental vertical ice wall into a frozen northern wasteland. Count exactly 1 continuous red travel path, with multiple visible arrowheads along it. On the right, show a jagged black volcanic island with glowing orange lava, fire, smoke, and ash clouds. In the middle distance, show dark pine forests, scattered castles, villages, roads, rocky mountains, marshy river channels, and mist. Across the upper third, show a colossal icy cliff or glacier wall spanning the entire width of the land, with a frozen plateau beyond it containing snowfields, ancient ruins, spires, distant mountains, and storm clouds. Use cold desaturated blues, grays, charcoal, icy whites, muted browns, and small accents of fiery orange lava and vivid red for the route. Lighting is dramatic and overcast, with heavy clouds, fog banks, sea spray, and high-detail worldbuilding. No labels, no UI, no border, no watermark, no readable text. Aspect ratio 16:9, ultra-wide cinematic composition, highly detailed, sharp, atmospheric, epic scale.
